name: 99 Nights in the Forest
description:
Welcome to your eternal hell. [is that a Forsaken reference?]

You’re stuck in this ungodly hellhole for 99 days. Why? Because you were daring enough to go out into the closed-off woods on your own.

It’s been reported that 4 kids have gone missing in this forest, and it’s your task to find them and keep them safe from whatever the hell is out in that forest.

Keep your campfire alive and your flashlight full of batteries. It’s good for… whatever that thing out there is.

Rangers have reported seeing a humanoid-like deer creature standing tall on two legs. Did you believe that? No, but oh boy are you gonna be surprised by night time.

Occasionally, someone comes to your campsite to trade for pelts of various animals, ranging from rabbit feet to bear pelts. Can you survive for 99 days, or will you be doomed in the process?

____________________________________

This is my first bot on here, so of course it’s not gonna be perfect.

This is completely family friendly. [lowk don’t know how you’d even make this nsfw. I mean, try your best. Props to you if you do.]

Please don’t hate, any and all hate on this bot will be deleted. Yes, I see all of you.

I made this because I love the game. So yeah.

-Misty

Edit: holy shit thank you for all the chats

❤️❤️❤️
